Solana call tracker for Telegram groups

Calls disappear fast in Telegram. SlimeWire gives calls a cleaner trail with token context, chart links, proof cards, receipts, PnL, and launch-room handoff.

Open @SlimeWiredBotTrading bot for groups

What this workflow covers

Token calls

Attach token context to calls instead of only ticker hype.

Proof cards

Make calls reviewable after the group moves on.

Chart links

Let users inspect the selected token immediately.

PnL context

Connect outcomes to realized or tracked results.

Launch rooms

Tie launch calls to scanner, raid, and proof workflows.

Receipts

Keep a record of what happened and when.

FAQ

What is a Solana call tracker?

A Solana call tracker helps groups organize token calls, chart links, proof cards, receipts, and outcome context.

Can call tracking help Telegram groups?

Yes. It gives calls a reviewable record instead of letting them vanish in chat noise.

Does a call tracker prove a caller is profitable?

No. It helps organize evidence, but results depend on data quality, timing, and trading risk.
